titleStmt.title: SII 38.375: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 375. (A.R. No. 375 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the south wall, second prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Achuyutadēva-Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1452, Vikruti, siṁha, śu. 14, Sunday, Tiruvōṇam = 7th August 1530 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records that the 1. pontiff of Bhīkshā-maṭham Īśuraṉ Śivāchāriyār who was responsible for the treasury of Tirumalar-uḍaiyanāyiṉār temple at Dēvakkāpuram, a dēvadānam in Mēlkuṉṟa-nāḍu, 2. tāṉattār 3. Māyēsvarar and 4. kaikkōḷa-mudaḷigal had conferred the lease or the right of cultivation (uḻavukāṇiāṭchi) of some fallow lands at Piramaṇampākkam on Viṟamāyēsvarar Mallikāṟchiṉa Ayyaṉ maṭha at Sembiyamaṅgalam in Mēlkuṉṟa-nāḍu (a sub-division) of Palkuṉṟa-kōṭṭam. The inscription also states that the leasee was to reclaim the land and was free to cultivate the crops of his choice. The boundaries of the land allotted were also given. Taxes such as puñjaikaḍamai, vāśalkaḍamai, taṟikkaḍamai, peṟkaḍamai, sekkōṭṭu, talaiyārikkam, paṭṭaḍai, nūlāyam, iḍaittīṟai, veṭṭivari, etc., were waived, instead he was to remit a certain amount of taxes every year to the temple treasury, which in turn was used to conduct the offerings and worship of the god, Tirumalar-uḍaiyanāyiṉār (when he was pleased to appear) at Vasantaṉ-maṇḍapa. The mode of levying these taxes every year was given as follows:- First year 5 paṇam, 5 kalam of paddy, Second year (kara) 10 paṇam, 10 kalam of paddy, Third year (Nandana) 15 paṇam, 15 kalam of paddy. Fourth year (Viśaya) 20 paṇam, 20 kalam of paddy. Fifth year (Jaya) 30 paṇam, 30 kalam of paddy, an amount which was fixed as permanent tax.
The temple accountant Uttaṇḍar wrote this deed on stone.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śvabhaRead subhamastu stiśrī maṉmakāmaṇṭalecuraṉ Ariyarāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikku tappuvarāyarkaṇṭaṉ muvarāyarkaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu kuṭātāṉ Emmaṇṭalamum tiṟaikoṇṭa yintu kāṇi
yirācātirācaṉ rācaparamecuraṉ kecataḷavipāṭaṉ pātāḷapayaṅkaraṉ tulukka taḷavipāṭaṉ tulukkamokām tavittāṉ pūṟuvatekṣaṇa paccima Uttiracatta camuttirātipati śrīvirappiṟatāpanaracanāyakkar kumārar Accintiya
tevamakārāyaṟ piṟutivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 5 10 2 mel cellā niṉṟa vikuṟutivaruṣattu ciṅkanāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu catuṟteciyum Ātitta vāramum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟa
koṭṭattu melkuṉṟanāṭu tevatāṉam tevakkāpuramRead tevakkāpuranayiṉār tirumalar Uṭaiyanayiṉār śrīpaṇṭārattukku kaṭaivaṟāṉa pikṣāmaṭam yicuraṉ civācāriyarum tāṉattārum māyecurarum kaikkoḷamutalikaḷum Ivvaṉaivarum yimmaṇṭalattu yikkoṭṭattu
yippaṟṟu cempiyamaṅkalam viṟamāyecurar mallikāṟciṉa Ayyaṉ maṭattukku Uḻavukāṇiāṭṣi paṇṇikkuṭutta tevakkāpuram tirumalaruṭaiya nayiṉār vacantaṉmaṇṭapa Upaiyattukku piramaṇampākkam Ūravar taṉmacātaṉu paṇṇik kuṭutta piramaṇampākkattil maṭuvukku vaṭakku
Allāḷamaṅkalam Ellaittaṟuvāyil kollaimeṭṭil cāṟe maṭapaḷḷattil tāṅkalum veṭṭi tāṅkalkiḻ Aṉāti tara yāraiyu yirukkaiyil nilamum tirutti nañcai māvaṭai maravaṭai veṇṭum payiṟceytu Aṉupavittukkoḷḷa ĒḻutiRead eḻutikkuṭutta cātaṉappaṭi tāṅkaḷ
veṭṭukiṟa tāṅkal kiḻ nañcainilattukku viparam maṭuvuṅ karaikku vaṭakku tāḻampaḷḷammaṭuvukku kiḻakkum niṅkalāka Aṇaikkaṭṭukku kiḻakku paṇamum kaṇ Uḻuta nilam niṅkalāka Aṇaikkaṭṭukku kiḻakku nallāḷmaṅkalattil Ēllaittaṟuvāy kuṟumpavīraṇaṉkuḷattukku teṟku
Allāḷamaṅkalattil Ellaittaṟuvāy kaṭaikkūṭṭu nayiṉām piḷḷaittāṅkalil kuṭaika teṟku I ta poṉa karai meṭṭukku meṟku puṟavukku meṟku cāṇāṭṭup paraiyaṉ puṟṟuṭaiyilār tiṟampukku vaṭakku yitukku Uṭpaṭa nilam Uṇṭāṉatu tām Uḻavukāṇi Āka
kaikkoṇṭu tāṅkalum veṭṭi nilamum tiruttikkuṭiyum Ēṟṟikkoṇṭu veṇṭum payiṟceytuk koḷḷak kaṭaivar Ākavum payiṟ ceyyumiṭattu kāṇikkai kaṭṭāyam māvaṭai maravaṭai vāḻai karumpu mañcaḷ yiñci kamuku teṉṉamaram nañcai
puñcai kaṭamaiyum vācalkaṭamai taṟikkaṭamai peṟkaṭamai cekkoṭṭu mātarikkam talaiyārikkam paṭṭaṭai nūlāyam yiṭaittuṟai veṭṭivari kopuravācalil piṟakkum paḻavari putuvari nallerutu naṟpacu koṇikaiRead kāṇikkai virimuṭṭu Eḷ ka(ā)ṭṭāyam koḷ
kaṭṭāyam Uṭutaṟai mukampārvai malaiamañci matiḷamañci maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭacakalaupātiyum Uḷpaṭa malaiyāṅkaṭṭu kuttakaiā vikuṟuti varuṣam Āṭimātam mutal Āṉi māta varaikku varuṣam 1 kku tirumalaruṭaiya nayiṉār śrīpaṇṭārattukku vacantaṉmaṇpaṭam
Upaiyattukku celuttum ø5 cūlakkālil ḷa5 100 yitaṟku Etirām karavaruṣam 1 kku ø10 cūlakkālil ḷā000 yitaṟku Etirām nantaṉa varuṣam 1 kku ø10 5 cūlakkālil ḷā5 100 yitaṟku Etirām vicaiya varuṣam 1 kku ø2 10ḷa 2 1000 yitaṟku Etirām ceya varuṣam 1 kku ø3 1000 Āka
Eṉṟeṉṟaikku cantirātittavaraiyum varuṣam 1 kku ø3 10 cūlakkālil ḷa 3 1000mutalāka varuṣam varuṣam toṟum koyil paṇṭārattile celuThe letter ‘lu’ is written below.ttak kaṭaThe letter ‘ṭa’ do.varākavum yinta vūḻavuRead uḻavukāṇiāṭkṣi cantirātittavaraiyum yivar ciṣayaparamparaiyāka naṭattakkaṭavutākavum
Ippaṭi cammatittu Uḻavukāṇi paṇṇik kuṭuttom mallikāṟciṉa Ayyaṉukku yicāṉacivācāriyarum tāṉamāyecurar kaikoḷamutaliyaḷ yivvaṉaivarukku yintak kāṇiyāṭṣikku Akutampaṇṇinavarkaḷ keṅkai
kkaraiyile kārāmpacuvaikoṉṟa pāvattile pokakkaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum yippaṭikku yinta kalveṭṭu Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilkaṇakku Uttaṇṭar Eḻuttu yivai kuruincomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.375 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
